title: Google just published a blog on how to build a smart finance assistant using Gemini 3.1 Pro + LlamaParse with code example. Instead of broken OCR, this setup actually understands messy PDFs like brokerage statements and turns them into clean structured data + readable insights. TLDR - Uses LlamaParse + Gemini 3.1 Pro for high quality document parsing - Handles complex PDFs with tables, multi columns, and messy layouts - ~13 to 15 percent better parsing vs raw LLM processing - Workflow splits into parse → extract → summarize pipeline - Text and table extraction run in parallel for speed - Gemini 3.1 Pro handles parsing, Flash handles final summary - Outputs clean structured data + human readable insights - Works well for financial documents like brokerage statements - Built as an event driven workflow so it scales easily
